raw_consumer_statement:
Hi. My name is XXXX XXXX XXXX. My husband XXXX XXXX is the primary account holder, i am the secondary. It is XXXX XXXX XXXX credit card. 
On XX/XX/XXXX i made an online order through XXXX XXXX for XXXX for the amount of {$80.00}. Almost immediately i changed my mind and cancelled the order. XXXX XXXX  accepted the cancellation, but refused to issue me the refund, alleging that the store already started working on my order, so i am responsible for the whole amount. It was a total lie, since i cancelled the order within 2 minutes. First, theres no way they were working on the order within the time frame. Second, if that was the case, XXXX XXXX  shouldnt have accepted the cancellation, they should have performed the delivery regardless. Instead they stole my money without providing any service. 

I tried to talk to them first, but they were extremely unhelpful, and then they just blocked me. So I disputed the charge with the credit card. I had to do it 3 times, since the merchant would continue charging me for the same amount. I provided the credit card the proof of the cancelled transaction and in the beginning they agreed with me. But now on XX/XX/XXXX they suddenly agreed with XXXX XXXX  since they assured that they have no records of any cancelled transaction! The credit card charges me back for {$80.00}, ignoring my submitted proof of the cancellation. I feel Ive been treated very unfairly : first from the merchant, then from the credit card, the same people that promised to protect my rights. Please help me to make it right.
